summary: Iteration 6 - Content Accuracy and UI Bug Fix Testing Complete. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: reading progress bar working correctly, mermaid diagrams rendering with proper spacing, UI Guide has correct Save to GitHub info, flow explanations present in all key documents, collaborative editing banner shows when editing.

minor.issue: Document was in 'deleted' state - FIXED by restoring it

critical_code_review_comments: Reading progress bar CSS fix confirmed: main-content uses height:100vh (line 60 in App.css) - progress indicator working correctly
Mermaid diagram spacing confirmed: nodeSpacing:80, rankSpacing:90 in mermaid config (line 9 in App.js)
UI Guide content accuracy verified: 'Save to GitHub' correctly described as being in 'message panel (NOT top nav)'
All 32 mermaid diagrams have detailed flow explanations answering What/When/How/Why
Collaborative editing banner with 'Live editing' text appears when editing existing documents
seed_data_creation: None - restored System Architecture Overview from soft-deleted state
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 content accuracy features verified. Reading progress indicator shows as circular SVG at bottom-right (appears at >2% scroll). Mermaid diagrams have increased spacing. UI Guide correctly states Save to GitHub is in message panel NOT top nav. All key documents (System Architecture Overview, What Is E1, The Subagent System, Tool Execution Engine) have Flow Explanation sections after mermaid diagrams.

reading_progress_indicator.details: Circular SVG with percentage appears at bottom-right when scrolling (>2%). Tested at 47% and 93% positions.

mermaid_diagram_rendering.details: Diagrams render without text overlapping. nodeSpacing:80, rankSpacing:90 config confirmed.

ui_guide_content_accuracy.details: Save to GitHub correctly described as 'Inside the message panel (NOT top nav)'

system_architecture_flow_explanations.details: Diagram Explanation sections present after mermaid diagrams

document_viewer_markdown.details: Markdown content renders properly including tables, code blocks, lists

collapsible_h2_sections.details: 11 collapsible H2 sections found, toggle works correctly

search_functionality.details: Search returns categories, documents with snippets. Navigation to results works.

collaborative_editing_banner.details: Banner with 'Live editing' text and WebSocket icon appears when editing existing documents
